# superlove live site repo

![LGBTQ+ friendly](https://pride-badges.pony.workers.dev/static/v1?label=lgbtq%2B%20friendly&stripeWidth=6&stripeColors=ef5350,f48fb1,7e57c2,2196f3,26c6da,43a047,eeff41,f9a825,ff5722) ![trans rights](https://pride-badges.pony.workers.dev/static/v1?label=trans%20rights&stripeWidth=6&stripeColors=5BCEFA,F5A9B8,FFFFFF,F5A9B8,5BCEFA) ![ruby on rails](https://img.shields.io/badge/ruby-rails-d30001?style=plastic&logo=rubyonrails) ![superlove READ ME badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/super-love-hotpink?logo=data:image/png;base64,)

## credits

- [SLWalker](https://sl-walker.tumblr.com/), who runs [Ad Astra](https://adastrafanfic.com/) & [CFAA](https://www.cfaarchive.org/), for creating and providing certain archive category icons to superlove.
- Walter of [Squidge.org](https://squidge.org/) for assistance with superlove in its creation & onward.
- [james_](https://archiveofourown.org/users/AO3_Systems/pseuds/james_), [OTW](https://www.transformativeworks.org/) systems administrator, for assisting with superlove problems & answering my dumb questions about OTW-archive
